text:
NAME: CLM_DRG_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
4 
SOURCE: 
Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 
FILE(S): 
IP base 
SNF base 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This is an MAO submitted field and may be different than the derived DRG code (variable called 
DRVD_DRG_CD). 
Nonpayment claims (zero reimbursement) may not have a DRG present.
